mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_code, name, description, type, enabled, expire_at, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM tenant WHERE tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, tenant_code, name, description, type, enabled, expire_at, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM tenant WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM tenant WHERE tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant (tenant_code, name, description, type, enabled, expire_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantCode}, #{name}, #{description}, #{type}, #{enabled}, #{expireAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE tenant SET enabled = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE tenant SET enabled = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE tenant SET expire_at = #{expireAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE tenant SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
